name: Ultimate Primate Safari
subtitle: A deep dive into the worlds of Gorillas and Chimpanzees.
description: This premium package combines the highlights of Bwindi Impenetrable Forest and Kibale National Park. Designed for wildlife enthusiasts, it offers a seamless blend of adventure, comfort, and profound primate encounters.

sections.content: Arrive at Entebbe International Airport where you will be met by our expert guide and transferred to the Kibale Forest region.
Enter the rainforest of Kibale, home to the highest density of primates in Africa, for an unforgettable trek with wild chimpanzees.
